intentSynonyms: show me my sprints in jira
see all my sprints in jira
list sprints for a board in jira
description: List sprints for a Jira board. Returns sprint name, state, and dates.

board_id.description: Board ID to list sprints for (use list_boards to find IDs)

state.description: Filter by sprint state: active, future, closed

max_results.description: Maximum number of sprints to return (default 50)

start_at.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination
